seoTitle: How to Add Customer Satisfaction Surveys in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to set up customer satisfaction surveys in Freshdesk so you can measure how customers feel about your support.
intro: Satisfaction surveys give you direct feedback on how well your support team is performing after each interaction. This guide shows how to set them up in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Open the survey settings
steps.body: In the admin panel, find the section dedicated to customer satisfaction surveys.

steps.heading: Enable the survey feature
steps.body: Turn on satisfaction surveys if they aren't already active for your account.

steps.heading: Customize the survey questions
steps.body: Adjust the rating scale and any follow-up questions to match what feedback you want to collect.

steps.heading: Choose when surveys are sent
steps.body: Set the survey to go out automatically after a ticket is resolved or closed.

faq.question: When does the survey get sent to customers?
faq.answer: Surveys are typically sent automatically once a ticket is marked resolved or closed.

faq.question: Can I customize the survey questions?
faq.answer: Yes, you can adjust the rating scale and add follow-up questions to fit your needs.

faq.question: Where can I see survey results?
faq.answer: Survey responses are usually available in your reporting or analytics section, tied back to individual tickets.

faq.question: Can I turn off surveys for certain ticket types?
faq.answer: Depending on your setup, you may be able to control which tickets trigger a satisfaction survey.
